session.user:
Perform the following renames in `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/implement.py`. Read the file first, then use Edit tool.
1. In `_implement_from_issue()` function (around line 134): - Parameter `plan_number: str` → `pr_number: str` - All uses of `plan_number` within the function → `pr_number` (lines ~167, 169, 177, 185, 224) - Docstring reference "plan_number" → "pr_number"
2. In `implement()` function (around line 448-458): - `target_info.target_type in ("plan_number", "plan_url")` → `target_info.target_type in ("pr_number", "pr_url")` (line 451, 457) - `target_info.plan_number` → `target_info.pr_number` (lines 452, 458) - `plan_number=target_info.plan_number` → `pr_number=target_info.pr_number` (line 466)
Do NOT rename: - `PlanSource`, `prepare_plan_source_from_file`, `complete_plan_files` - these are plan-as-concept - `PlanNotFound` - this is a type name - `plan_store.get_plan()` or `plan.title`, `plan.body`, `plan.url` - these are PlanDetails model fields - `create_impl_folder`, `save_plan_ref` - these are about plan files - Any docstring mentions of "plan" as a concept - `extract_plan_from_current_branch` - plan-as-concept function name

session.tool_result:
1→"""Command to implement features from plans or plan files. 2→ 3→This command runs implementation in the current directory using Claude. 4→It creates an impl folder (under .erk/impl-context/<branch>/) with the plan 5→content and invokes Claude for execution. 6→ 7→Usage: 8→- Plan number mode: erk implement 123 or erk implement <URL> 9→- Plan file mode: erk implement path/to/plan.md 10→- Auto-detect mode: erk implement (on plan branch with plan-ref.json) 11→""" 12→ 13→from pathlib import Path 14→ 15→import click 16→ 17→from erk.cli.alias import alias 18→from erk.cli.commands.completions import complete_plan_files 19→from erk.cli.commands.implement_shared import ( 20→ PlanSource, 21→ build_claude_args, 22→ build_command_sequence, 23→ detect_target_type, 24→ execute_interactive_mode, 25→ execute_non_interactive_mode, 26→ extract_plan_from_current_branch, 27→ implement_common_options, 28→ normalize_model_name, 29→ output_activation_instructions, 30→ prepare_plan_source_from_file,
... [465 lines omitted] ...
169→ user_output(click.style("Error: ", fg="red") + f"Plan #{plan_number} not found") 176→ click.style("Error: ", fg="red") 389→ raise click.ClickException("--yolo and --safe are mutually exclusive") 439→ raise click.ClickException( 460→ click.style("Error: ", fg="red") + "Failed to extract plan number from target"

session.assistant:
Perfect! I've successfully completed all the requested renames in `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/implement.py`. Here's a summary of what was changed:
## Changes Made
### 1. In `_implement_from_issue()` function (lines 134-242): - **Line 137**: Parameter renamed from `plan_number: str` to `pr_number: str` - **Line 151**: Docstring updated from "plan_number: GitHub plan number" to "pr_number: GitHub plan number" - **Line 167**: Variable usage changed from `plan_number` to `pr_number` in `ctx.plan_store.get_plan(repo.root, pr_number)` - **Line 169**: Error message changed from `Plan #{plan_number}` to `Plan #{pr_number}` - **Line 177**: Error message changed from `Plan #{plan_number}` to `Plan #{pr_number}` - **Line 185**: Dry-run description changed from `plan #{plan_number}` to `plan #{pr_number}` - **Line 224**: Changed `plan_id=str(plan_number)` to `plan_id=str(pr_number)`
### 2. In `implement()` function (lines 447-475): - **Line 451**: Condition changed from `("plan_number", "plan_url")` to `("pr_number", "pr_url")` - **Line 452**: Changed `target_info.plan_number` to `target_info.pr_number` - **Line 457**: Condition changed from `("plan_number", "plan_url")` to `("pr_number", "pr_url")` - **Line 458**: Changed `target_info.plan_number` to `target_info.pr_number` - **Line 466**: Changed `plan_number=target_info.plan_number` to `pr_number=target_info.pr_number`
## What Was NOT Changed
As requested, the following were preserved: - All references to `PlanSource`, `prepare_plan_source_from_file`, `complete_plan_files` (plan-as-concept) - `PlanNotFound` exception type - `plan_store.get_plan()` and `plan.title`, `plan.body`, `plan.url` (PlanDetails model fields) - `create_impl_folder`, `save_plan_ref` (plan file operations) - All docstring mentions of "plan" as a concept - `extract_plan_from_current_branch` function name - All comments and usage text referring to "plan" generically
The renames specifically targeted the internal parameter and field names that represent PR numbers while preserving all plan-as-concept terminology.
